notFound.title: 404 Page Not Found
notFound.description: Did you forget to add the page to the router?

landing.heroDescription: The next generation of democratic participation. Unified voting for colleges, companies, and societies with role-based identity management.
landing.registerDescription: Select your role and enter your details to access election features.

toasts.accountCreatedCandidate: Account created successfully. Continue to candidate dashboard.
toasts.accountCreatedVoter: Account created successfully. Proceed to verification.
toasts.noProfile: No profile found for this account.

verification.title: Identity Verification
verification.description: To ensure one person one vote, we require standard identity checks.
verification.emailSentMessage: A verification link has been sent to {{email}}. Click the link in your email to verify your account.

tips.delay: • Verification may take a few seconds
tips.resend: • Click "Resend Email" if you don't see it

verification.biometricDesc: Liveness check using your device camera
verification.biometricPrivacy: Your biometric data is processed entirely in your browser and is never stored on our servers. This ensures privacy while preventing duplicate votes.

toasts.emailSentDesc: Check {{email}} and click the verification link to continue.

camera.permissionDenied: Camera access denied. Please enable permissions to proceed.
camera.verifiedDesc: Your biometric data matched the registered profile.

voterDashboard.title: Voter Dashboard
voterDashboard.welcome: Welcome back. View active elections and cast your vote.
voterDashboard.noElectionsDesc: There are no live elections available for your role right now.

categorySelection.unavailableDesc: This election is inactive or not available for your role.
categorySelection.selectCategory: Please select a category to cast your vote.

candidateDetail.unavailableDesc: This election is inactive or not available for your role.
candidateDetail.votedDesc: You have already submitted your vote in this category.
candidateDetail.confirmDesc: Confirm your vote for {{candidate}} as {{category}}. This is cryptographically signed and permanent.

toasts.submittedDesc: Your vote for {{name}} has been recorded.

candidateDashboard.title: Candidate Dashboard
candidateDashboard.description: Apply to elections and track admin approval status.
candidateDashboard.applyDesc: Submit your candidature for a specific election and category.
candidateDashboard.noActiveElections: No active elections available for applications right now.
candidateDashboard.myApplicationsDesc: Review the status of your submitted applications.

toasts.submittedDesc: Your application has been sent to admin for review.

adminLogin.title: Admin Sign In
adminLogin.desc: Secure access to the election administration dashboard

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
errors.noAdmin: This account does not have admin privileges.

toasts.successDesc: Welcome to the Election Admin Panel

adminDashboard.title: System Administration
adminDashboard.description: Global election management and lifecycle control.
adminDashboard.noPendingDesc: All candidate applications have been reviewed.
adminDashboard.noResultsDesc: Create an election to start monitoring vote counts.
adminDashboard.wizardDesc: Configure election rules, categories, and eligibility.

toasts.createFailed: Could not create election. Check console for details.
